issues: [Cognitive Load] page.tsx: Form inputs without labels. Use <label> for accessibility and clarity.
warnings: [Reflective] page.tsx: Long-form content without brand story/values. Add 'About' or 'Why We Exist' section.
[Trust] page.tsx: Form without security indicators. Add 'SSL Secure' or lock icon.
[Trust] page.tsx: No social proof detected. Consider adding testimonials, ratings, or 'Trusted by' logos.
[Persuasion] page.tsx: Prices without anchoring. Show original price to frame discount value.
[Persuasion] page.tsx: Social proof without specific numbers. Use 'Join 10,000+' format.
[Typography] page.tsx: No line length constraint (45-75ch). Use max-w-prose or max-w-[65ch].
[Typography] page.tsx: Text elements found without line-height. Body: 1.4-1.6, Headings: 1.1-1.3
[Typography] page.tsx: Fixed font sizes without clamp(). Consider fluid typography: clamp(MIN, PREFERRED, MAX)
[Typography] page.tsx: No h1 found. Each page should have one primary heading.
[Visual] page.tsx: Flat design with no depth. Consider shadows or subtle gradients for hierarchy.
[Color] page.tsx: Possible low-contrast combination detected. Verify WCAG AA (4.5:1 for text).
[Animation] page.tsx: Async operations without loading indicator. Add skeleton or spinner for perceived performance.
